function.name: exec_proot
function.description: Run a shell command inside the default proot distro (the primary shell environment).

cmd.description: Shell command to run inside proot. Executed via /bin/sh -lc in the proot environment.

cwd.description: Working directory inside proot. If omitted, uses the default home directory.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the command.

stdin.description: Optional stdin payload for the command.

timeout_seconds.description: Optional timeout for the command execution.
